query:
SELECT id, localId, packageBookingId, sessionNumber, sessionTotal, packageName, totalPrice, giftApplied, giftCode, giftUsedAmount, status, createdAt FROM appointments WHERE packageBookingId = 'pkg-1778531227268-i2aqop' ORDER BY sessionNumber;
SELECT id, code, giftData, usedAt, usedByBookingId FROM gift_cards WHERE code = 'GIFT-A4PT4RNA';
